Hello, I'm

Chunchu Nithin

Cybersecurity Student & Aspiring SOC Analyst

Detail-oriented Computer Science student specializing in cybersecurity with hands-on experience in SIEM deployment, intrusion detection, and log analysis. Seeking a SOC Analyst or Security Engineer role to defend real-world systems.

About Me

Who am I?

I am a passionate and detail-oriented B.Tech Computer Science student at SR University, Warangal, specializing in cybersecurity. I am proficient in industry-standard security tools including Splunk, Wazuh, and the ELK Stack.

With hands-on experience in SIEM deployment, intrusion detection, and log analysis, I enjoy building robust detection pipelines and simulating real-world attack scenarios. My goal is to protect enterprise systems as a skilled SOC Analyst or Security Engineer.

My Experience

Deployed and managed a home SIEM lab using Wazuh, ELK Stack, and Sysmon — simulating enterprise-grade security monitoring and achieving 90%+ detection of simulated attack scenarios.
Configured Snort and Suricata as inline IDS/IPS and authored custom detection rules for port scanning, SQL injection, and ICMP flood attacks — with zero false positives in test environments.
Developed Python and Bash scripts to automate log parsing, threat hunting, and IOC extraction — integrated with Splunk via HEC, reducing manual review time by approximately 60%.
Earned the Certified Network Security Practitioner (CNSP) certification from The SecOps Group and completed Cybersecurity Fundamentals from Infosys Springboard in 2025.

My Projects

Home SIEM Lab
Deployed a fully functional SIEM environment using Wazuh manager and ELK Stack on a local virtual network. Configured Sysmon on Windows endpoints and built Kibana dashboards. Simulated brute-force, privilege escalation, and lateral movement attacks mapped to MITRE ATT&CK TTPs — achieving 90%+ detection rate.
Wazuh ELK Stack Sysmon Kibana VirtualBox MITRE ATT&CK
Network Intrusion Detection System
Configured Snort and Suricata as inline IDS/IPS on a segmented virtual network. Authored custom Snort rules to detect port scanning (Nmap), SQL injection patterns, and ICMP flood attacks with zero false-positive rate. Validated accuracy with Wireshark packet capture analysis.
Snort Suricata Wireshark IDS/IPS Nmap
Log Analysis & Threat Hunting Script
Developed a Python script to parse and correlate Windows Event Logs and Linux syslogs, flagging anomalous login patterns and privilege escalation attempts. Integrated with Splunk via HEC for automated ingestion and alerting. Reduced manual log review time by ~60%.
Python Bash Splunk HEC Log Analysis
